video.title: How to Auto-Qualify Demo Requests with AI Before Your Sales Team Wastes a Call
video.angle: Inbound pipeline triage using form enrichment, ICP scoring, and instant routing
video.hook: Demo forms look great until your calendar fills with students, agencies, and tiny teams that will never buy. I built an AI intake workflow that enriches each lead, scores fit in seconds, and routes only real pipeline to sales.

production.style: Ken Burns animated slides featuring Byte the Robot. Narration first, results-focused.

scenes.title: The Hook (0:00–0:30)
scenes.voiceover: Here is the automated workflow I built for How to Auto-Qualify Demo Requests with AI Before Your Sales Team Wastes a Call. It streamlines your operations, cuts costs, and runs in the background.
scenes.visual_note: Introduce Byte the Robot in a confident, welcoming pose showing the main pipeline metrics overlay.

scenes.title: The Problem (0:30–1:30)
scenes.voiceover: Before this system, teams spent hours managing this manually. It was slow, error-prone, and highly expensive.
scenes.visual_note: Byte looking overwhelmed by manual files, showing chaotic workflows.

scenes.title: The Stack (1:30–2:30)
scenes.voiceover: Our automated stack utilizes standard B2B developer tools, Claude API, and a simple local database. Total cost is virtually free.
scenes.visual_note: Byte proudly pointing to the 3-tool workflow stack diagrams.

scenes.title: The Build (2:30–6:00)
scenes.voiceover: Let's dive into the technical details of the build. We configure the webhook, set up data selectors, and chain API actions.
scenes.visual_note: Byte dressed as a developer in front of a sleek terminal showing code execution.

scenes.title: The Results (6:00–7:00)
scenes.voiceover: The results are incredible. Execution time dropped by ninety percent, while output reliability reached absolute perfection.
scenes.visual_note: Byte celebrating, with massive green before/after comparison metrics in the background.

scenes.title: The CTA (7:00–end)
scenes.voiceover: The full boilerplate and playbook are linked in the description. Download the code, and drop a comment today. This channel needs your support. Please subscribe, leave a word of appreciation for the author, and may God bless you.
scenes.visual_note: Byte gesturing towards a subscribe button and a glowing download link.

metadata.description_template:
Demo forms look great until your calendar fills with students, agencies, and tiny teams that will never buy. I built an AI intake workflow that enriches each lead, scores fit in seconds, and routes only real pipeline to sales.
